General.Name: Lionheart Holdings
General.Description: Lionheart Holdings does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Lionheart Holdings was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Miami, Florida.
